notes: Running head matches. Left-margin line numbers were not transcribed into body, which is correct. Main body is largely accurate; one omitted initial section mark and one punctuation difference noted. Apparatus contains several transcription issues, especially a garbled lemma/variant in note 11 and nomen sacrum note in 13.
